body: Made the most amazing Thai green curry last night. The paste from scratch is so much better than store-bought.
What goes into homemade green curry paste? I always just buy the jar.
Green chilies, lemongrass, galangal, shallots, garlic, cilantro roots, cumin, coriander, and shrimp paste. Blend it all up.
That's a lot of ingredients! Is it worth the effort compared to jarred paste?
Absolutely. The freshness is night and day. Plus you can adjust the heat level exactly how you like it.
